comment: Template configuration file - Copy to organizer_config.json and customize

drives.comment: Define drive shortcuts here. You can use these names in sync_pairs below. If a drive is not available, the program will skip it gracefully.

sync_pairs.comment: Example: Using drive placeholders with cloud storage
Example: You can also use direct paths

comment_exclude: These patterns are excluded from sync. Files and folders matching these patterns will not be synchronized.
comment_output: Where organized files are stored (with soft links). Use ~ for home directory.
comment_sync: enable_folder_sync: true = sync folders, false = only organize files
comment_rsync_mode: checksum = thorough but SLOW. timestamp = fast (recommended)
comment_chunking: Large folders sync in chunks. Each chunk times out after 60 min to prevent infinite hangs.
comment_soft_links: Limit how many categories a single file can be linked to. Prevents over-categorization.

ml_content_analysis.comment: min_word_length: 5 avoids short common words. Higher max_categories discovers more topics. use_clip: false by default (very slow on CPU, ~30min first load)
